title: CSS Cubic Bezier Editor
description: Drag P1 / P2 handles to shape a cubic-bezier easing curve, live preview the animation, switch between presets, copy CSS in one click.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: All math and animations run in your browser. Nothing is uploaded. Drag freely and try the presets.

editor.heading: Curve editor
editor.hint: Drag the green / purple handles, or tune the sliders below. Y can overshoot into [-0.5, 1.5].

preview.heading: Animation preview
preview.hint: Three balls loop back and forth so you can compare the current curve with linear and ease.
